title: Eternia:Origins
description: Eternia Origins is a modpack that aims to give a 'better minecraft' experience to Origins while also adding content that encourages cooperation with others.
body:
![Summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23fd2f5b6354b3391810bfdc645543ed610bb97d.png)

  Eternia:Origins is a modpack with the goal of enhancing the vanilla Minecraft experience while also giving plenty of opportunities for optimization, cooperation with others, and adventure! With a combination of building, cooking, furniture, and companion mods - there's plenty of ways to customize and make the world truly yours!

![Modpack Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/177101a76b2e07e66de151f3da5cfc6958fc9639.png)

- ✨ 20 Origins!
- 👔 14 Classes! 
- 🎲 7 sizes!
- 🌎 Overhaul to Dimension Generation!
- 🌄 New biomes and structures to explore!
- ⚔️ Upgraded & New Boss Fights!!
- 🔧 Built for a combination of performance and aesthetic!
- 🥞 Cooking
- 📦 Additions to redstone, storage, and farming
- 🎩 HATSS!!
- 🎺 INSTRUMENTSSS!!!



> Menu music is "Bojji Sentoutaisei by Mayuko"
> > This modpack makes use of '[Visual Traveler's Titles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-travelers-titles)' to help with the aesthetic as you switch dimesions. 
>>>This modpack is mainly for our friend group/smp which is found through the discord link

I also had lots of help from my friend XenDragon with the creation, Colcifer for aestetic, and Benthebeaver for balancing changes.
